scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: taskkill //F //IM python.exe 2>nul || true && concurrently "npm run dev:redis" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:redis: .\redis-windows\redis-server.exe .\redis-windows\redis.windows.conf || echo "Redis already running or failed to start"
